title: Turtlepack
description: The resource pack used natively on the Turtlecraft Minecraft server.
body:
![TCS6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5893b4257edbffd100e62d28b96ad75716d51bdc.png)

## [Latest version: v12.0.0 - Made for Minecraft 1.21.10]
This is the resource pack used natively on the Turtlecraft Minecraft server. It focuses on vanilla-style tweaks to fix visual bugs, make certain block and item textures more true to their vanilla vibe, and redesign a few mobs and aspects of the game that still feel outdated even after 1.14's texture update.
